Northeastern Theme Park Engineering Club

Northeastern’s Theme Park Engineering Club is a dynamic community for those passionate about the intersection of art, science, and engineering in the world of theme park design.

Whether you’re fascinated by the intricate science behind attraction design, captivated by the artistry of creating immersive experiences, or simply a roller coaster enthusiast, our club offers something for everyone. We delve into the physics, engineering, and illusions that power some of the world’s most iconic rides. Members have the opportunity to engage in hands-on projects, collaborate on innovative designs, and compete in both in-house challenges and prestigious national competitions. Join us as we explore the magic of theme park engineering and push the boundaries of what’s possible!

Who we are

Engineers

We dive into the nuts and bolts of themed entertainment — from ride mechanics to structural systems. Whether you're into animatronics, coasters, or control systems, the club offers a space to explore these topics with other students.

Creatives

NUTPEC is all about creativity, supporting new ideas and innovative thinking. Whether you're designing rides or working on immersive experiences, we're here to help develop and refine your concepts.

Leaders

The club is built on collaboration, bringing together students from a variety of backgrounds. We work as a team, share knowledge, and connect with professionals in the themed entertainment industry.

What we do

Competitions…

Get involved today

Attend our meetings

Come join us for our weekly meetings to stay updated on club events, attend guest speaker seminars, and more! NUTPEC meets every week on Thursdays, 7:00pm @ EXP 204 (subject to change).

Join our email list

Keep in touch with what's happening at the club through our weekly email newsletters. Click here and fill out the form to add your email to the distribution list.

Follow our socials

Connect with us on LinkedIn, follow our Instagram, and join the Engage for important news and updates. See photos or clips of our club activities and events. Connect with other club members or organizations.
